message:
✨ Improve AI summary to 2 paragraphs and fix hover-sticks issue (#975)

- Expand summary from 2 sentences to 2 paragraphs: paragraph 1 covers
  overall health and per-platform status, paragraph 2 highlights notable
  patterns (streaks, regressions, standouts, active runs)
- Add onMouseLeave to guide list so hovering away returns to AI summary
  instead of permanently showing the last hovered guide's details

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
